summary: Backend endpoints all working (200s, correct payloads). Frontend is BLOCKED by a runtime crash in TitleBar.jsx that unmounts the entire workspace: `new URL(settings.server_url).host` throws when server_url is not a valid URL (backend currently returns server_url='d'). This prevents Explorer, Main, AI, Settings, and Player from rendering at all.
passed: GET /api/files/folders returns nested folder list with f-root, f-vlogs, etc. (200)
GET /api/files/videos returns seeded videos incl. v-1 'PC Upgrade — GPU + Cooling' (200)
POST /api/ai/query for 'upgrading my PC' returns hits from v-1 and v-3 with timestamps (200)
Frontend document loads, dark theme body class applied (theme-dark, bg rgb(9,9,11))

failed.issue: Uncaught runtime error: TypeError: Failed to construct 'URL': Invalid URL. Line 81 executes `new URL(settings.server_url).host` unconditionally when server_url is truthy but not a valid absolute URL. Backend currently returns server_url='d' (a single character), causing the entire React tree to unmount. As a result NONE of the workspace panels (explorer-panel, main-panel, ai-panel), no video cards, no folder nodes, no settings-view, no player render. Every downstream frontend test in this iteration is blocked by this single defect.
failed.evidence: Screenshot shows Uncaught runtime errors overlay with stack at TitleBar. Selectors [data-testid='explorer-panel'], [data-testid='main-panel'], [data-testid='ai-panel'], [data-testid='ai-input'], [data-testid='settings-view'] all MISSING. Body still gets theme-dark class from StoreProvider but page content is empty.

action_items: Fix TitleBar.jsx line 81 to safely handle invalid/partial URLs. Suggested: wrap in try/catch or use a helper: `const host = (() => { try { return new URL(settings.server_url).host; } catch { return settings.server_url || 'no server'; } })();`
Optionally also validate/normalize server_url on the backend PUT /api/settings so a value like 'd' cannot be persisted, or auto-strip to empty string when it doesn't match http(s)://host.

Once fixed, re-run: workspace 3-panel render, folder tree click filters videos, video card opens player with valid <video src>, AI query returns clickable ai-hit-v-1 that seeks player, settings theme/accent toggle, settings-test-server.
